name: t1542_001_crontab
query_text: SELECT event, minute, hour, day_of_month, month, day_of_week, command, path FROM crontab;

name: t1542_001_startup
query_text: SELECT name, path, source, status, type FROM startup_items;

name: t1542_001_proc_hidden
query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, on_disk, cwd FROM processes WHERE on_disk = 0 OR path = '' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;
